broker_account_dependency_block.p5_requirement: A later supervised demo-readiness review must supply a sanitized broker/account snapshot before any real position size can be calculated.
broker_account_dependency_block.reason: This P4 review defines formulas and guardrails only; it must not read credentials, balances, account identifiers, broker data, or live prices.

daily_stop_rules.calculation_dependency: Requires a sanitized broker/account snapshot in P5 before account-specific calculation.
daily_stop_rules.trigger: Stop new orders for the review day if realized loss plus open risk reaches 1.00 percent of account equity.

final_owner_sentence: AIOS Forex P4 C1 risk and position-sizing review is complete: c1-eur-buy is source-cleared for P5 supervised demo-trade readiness review only, while demo trading, live trading, broker/API, credentials, money movement, 22/6 autonomy, vacation/luxury mode, and 100-120 percent return claims remain blocked until separately proven and approved.
forbidden_actions: demo trading without later evidence gate

kill_switch_rules.rule: Any trigger blocks progression until the issue is reviewed and the P4 or P5 evidence is rerun.
triggers: daily loss at or above 1.00 percent
weekly loss at or above 2.00 percent
more than one order for the same signal
broker/account dependency requested before sanitized P5 snapshot
credential, account, broker/API, order, scheduler, daemon, webhook, production, or autonomy path detected

max_loss_rules.rule: Loss exposure must stay inside the per-trade, daily, weekly, consecutive-loss, and strategy-drawdown gates before P5 can review supervised demo-trade readiness.

one_order_rules.rule: The C1 signal may have no more than one open position and no more than one order per signal during later supervised review.

review_only_boundary: demo trading without later evidence gate

blocked_inputs: real account equity in this P4 review
position_sizing_formula.real_sizing_block: Real sizing is blocked until a later supervised demo-readiness review supplies a sanitized broker/account snapshot.

broker_account_dependency_block.p5_requirement: A later supervised demo-readiness review must supply a sanitized broker/account snapshot before any real position size can be calculated.
broker_account_dependency_block.reason: This P4 review defines formulas and guardrails only; it must not read credentials, balances, account identifiers, broker data, or live prices.

weekly loss at or above 2.00 percent
more than one order for the same signal

broker_account_dependency_block.evidence: Real sizing is blocked until P5 supplies a sanitized broker/account snapshot.

conservative_defaults.evidence: Risk defaults cap exposure at 0.25 percent per trade, 1.00 percent daily, 2.00 percent weekly, three consecutive losses, one open position, one order per signal, mandatory TP/SL, at least 1.20 reward-to-risk, and 5.00 percent strategy drawdown.

formula_only_position_sizing.evidence: Position sizing is formula-only and requires account_equity and stop_loss_value_per_unit without reading broker data.

no_demo_live_approval.evidence: P4 defines review policy only and does not approve demo trading, live trading, broker/API access, credentials, order placement, or money movement.

required_risk_rules_present.evidence: All required P4 risk policy keys must exist.

source_evidence.use: Provides the authoritative P3 proof evaluator consumed by this P4 risk review.
Records P3 proof status, P4 readiness, score, failed requirements, and next lane.
Explains the source-backed P3 decision and preserves the no demo or live trading boundary.
Routes the source-cleared candidate into P4 risk and position-sizing review only.

tp_sl_guardrails.rule: Every later supervised demo-trade review candidate must include a stop loss, take profit, and at least 1.20 reward-to-risk before any order approval can be considered.
